chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6169 of 2021 CP D 1441 of 2023 CP D 2589 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to maintainability of petition. 26.03.2025 Mr. Kashif Hanif, advocate for the petitioner in CP D 6169 of 2021. Mr. Naeem Suleman, advocate for the petitioner in CP D 1441 of 2023. Mr. Faizan Hussain Memon, advocate for the petitioner in CP D 2589 of 2023. Mr. Ashraf Ali Butt, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Rehmat un Nisa, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. It is jointly stated that these petitions are squarely covered by the Division Bench judgment of this Court in the case of Bilquees Khalid & Another vs. Federation of Pakistan & Another reported as 2022 CLC 2002, therefore, in reliance upon the ratio therein may be disposed of upon the same terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in each connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
